flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at River Parishes Community College fell 35% between 2006 and 2009 (8.8% → 5.7%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at River Parishes Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at River Parishes Community College are 17% above the public certificate-predominant peer median ($37.8k vs $32.3k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at River Parishes Community College rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.9k).
